chen.ist

chen.ist delivers digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, cloud services, and technology education for modern organizations.

Build.
Secure.
Grow.

Digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, and education — built on open-source for organizations that value control.

What we do

End-to-end technology services built on transparency and security.

Digital Infrastructure

Open-source, UNIX, and Apple platforms for SMBs.

Learn more

Security

SOC monitoring, threat hunting, NIS2 compliance.

Learn more

Cloud

Migration, DevOps, and multi-cloud infrastructure.

Learn more

Academy

Courses, hackathons, and hands-on training.

Learn more

Resilience

Business continuity and disaster recovery.

Learn more

Infrastructure you
actually own.

Nextcloud for files. Matrix for chat. Keycloak for SSO. NixOS for servers. Apple Business for devices. We deploy and manage it all — you keep every config, every credential, every byte of data.

Explore digital infrastructure

Threats don't sleep.
Neither do we.

Our Blue Team SOC runs 24/7 with open-source tools you can audit. Real-time detection, proactive hunting, and incident response — for organizations that take security seriously.

Explore security services

Skills that stick.
Not certificates that collect dust.

Hackathons, intensive trainings, and multi-week courses in cybersecurity and open-source. Everything we teach, we do. Everything you learn, you apply on Monday morning.
